title: Direx
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Direx''' was the name given to a person who sat on the [[Executive Directorship Board|Direx Board]]. Each of them were members of the voting corporations that made up the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 2013-07-05 -->[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]]
